heading: Conviction of lesser offenses
label: 950s Conviction of lesser offenses
text: An accused may be found guilty of an offense necessarily included in the offense charged or of an attempt to commit either the offense charged or an attempt to commit either the offense charged or an offense necessarily included therein.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 950s, added , , , related to conviction of lesser included offense, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 109–366, § 3(a)(1)120 Stat. 2624Pub. L. 111–84Oct. 17, 2006
